title: IVR and hold-heavy claim call reaches paid outcome
success_criteria: The assistant waits through IVR and hold turns without treating them as claim status.
The assistant keeps the final representative conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-IVR-PAID.
The assistant captures paid status and payer reference.
The assistant closes only after the representative provides substantive status.

criteria: The transcript reaches paid status after IVR and hold turns.
The assistant does not mistake hold prompts for claim status.
The assistant does not disclose unnecessary patient details during IVR.
The assistant does not invent facts while on hold.
The assistant handles IVR prompts and hold music as non-substantive turns.
The assistant resumes the claim-status request once a representative joins.
The assistant summarizes paid status and reference.
The assistant ends the call after the required data is captured.

notes: Synthetic IVR and hold fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Automated system: say claims, eligibility, or provider services.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Please hold while we connect your call.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: I will wait for a claims representative.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Claims representative speaking. How can I help?

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: I am checking status for claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-IVR-PAID.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: That claim is paid. The reference is REF-IVR-GOLF.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have paid status with reference REF-IVR-GOLF for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-IVR-PAID.
